base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of octorok_blue_variant — a character from 1986 legend of zelda. Blue Octorok — stronger palette variant (2 hits instead of 1, deals 2 HP damage). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Blue Octorok — stronger palette variant (2 hits instead of 1, deals 2 HP damage)
